mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_users_lwc (USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NICNM, USER_EML) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_users_lwc ORDER BY USER_ID ASC
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_users_lwc WHERE USER_EML = #{value})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_users_lwc WHERE USER_ID = #{value})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_users_lwc WHERE USER_NICNM = #{value})
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_users_lwc WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_EML = #{email})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_users_lwc WHERE USER_NICNM = #{newNickname} AND USER_ID != #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_users_lwc SET USER_PW = #{newPassword} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE t_users_lwc SET USER_NICNM = #{newNickname} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE t_users_lwc SET USER_ICON = #{userIcon} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NICNM, U.USER_ICON, R.WIN AS WIN_CNT, R.LOSE AS LOSE_CNT, R.DRAW AS DRAW_CNT FROM t_users_lwc U LEFT JOIN t_users_rank_lwc R ON U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, WIN AS wins, LOSE AS losses, DRAW AS draws FROM t_users_rank_lwc

SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NICNM AS nickname, u.USER_ICON AS userIcon, r.WIN AS winCount, r.LOSE AS loseCount, r.DRAW AS drawCount FROM t_users_lwc u LEFT JOIN t_users_rank_lwc r ON u.USER_ID = r.USER_ID WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_users_rank_lwc SET WIN = 0, DRAW = 0, LOSE = 0 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ AS roomId, TITLE AS roomTitle, PLAYER1 AS playerO, PLAYER2 AS playerX, STATUS AS status, BOARD AS boardData, RGTR_ID AS managerId, CURR_TURN AS currentTurn FROM t_game_lwc WHERE STATUS IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_game_lwc (SEQ, TITLE, PLAYER1, STATUS, BOARD, RGTR_ID, CURR_TURN, REG_DT) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{roomTitle}, #{playerO}, #{status}, #{boardData}, #{managerId}, #{playerO}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
